title: Access Denied by Web Application Firewall
symptom: When attempting to scrape data using the 'Extract HTML Content' node, the request is blocked with an 'Access Denied' message.
applies_when: Scraping a website with a firewall
not_this_if: The request is successful without any errors
Different node or method is used for scraping
root_cause: The website has a Web Application Firewall that blocks requests after several attempts, preventing access to the content. This is common with sites that want to protect their data from scraping.
fix_steps: Reduce the frequency of requests to the website
Use a different IP address or proxy to avoid being blocked
Check if the website allows scraping in their terms of service
agent_instruction: Adjust your scraping strategy to avoid triggering the website's firewall.
safety_notes: Ensure compliance with the website's terms of service to avoid legal issues.
